businessProfile.description: Retail business analyzing customer purchasing patterns and segmentation. Uses RFM (Recency, Frequency, Monetary) metrics to understand customer value and behavior.

overview.headline: The customer base divides into three equal groups with distinct spending patterns and engagement levels. High-risk customers show lower scores and potentially declining engagement, while low-risk customers demonstrate stronger performance metrics.
risks: Medium and high-risk groups may require intervention to prevent further score deterioration
Uneven customer distribution across risk levels could impact revenue stability
opportunities: Low-risk group presents opportunity for upselling and premium service offerings
Medium-risk customers could be converted to high-value through targeted engagement strategies
